Actions.Text: COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES

Title: Requires body armor worn by New York city emergency services personnel to be replaced every five years
Summary: Requires body armor worn by New York city emergency services personnel to be replaced every five years.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to requiring the city of New York to replace body armor worn by emergency services personnel every five years
